user.title: BC Hydro Account
user.description: Enter your BC Hydro credentials. A read-only secondary account is recommended.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to BC Hydro

backfill.title: Import Historical Data
backfill.description: Fetch and import historical consumption data from BC Hydro. Dates in YYYY-MM-DD format. Large ranges are fetched in 30-day chunks automatically.

abort.backfill_complete: Historical data import complete. Check notifications for details.

backfill.name: Backfill historical data
backfill.description: Fetch and import historical consumption data from BC Hydro for a date range.
